spec.query:
from(bucket: "metrics")
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "node_status" and r._field == "cpu_usage_percent")
  |> group(columns: ["node_id"])
  |> last()
  |> group()
  |> count()

from(bucket: "metrics")
  |> range(start: -1m)  
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "gpu_status") 
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "temperature_celsius")  
  |> group()  
  |> top(n: 1, columns: ["_value"])  
  |> keep(columns: ["node_id", "_value"])  
  |> yield(name: "max_gpu_temp_node")

from(bucket: "metrics")
  |> range(start: -1m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "gpu_status")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "power_watts")
  |> group()
  |> top(n: 1, columns: ["_value"])
  |> keep(columns: ["node_id", "_value"])
  |> yield(name: "power")

from(bucket: "metrics")
  |> range(start: -1m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "node_status")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "cpu_usage_percent")
  |> group()
  |> top(n: 1, columns: ["_value"])
  |> keep(columns: ["node_id", "_value"])
  |> yield(name: "cpu")

from(bucket: "metrics")
  |> range(start: -1m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "node_status")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "memory_usage_percent")
  |> group()
  |> top(n: 1, columns: ["_value"])
  |> keep(columns: ["node_id", "_value"])
  |> yield(name: "mem_cpu")

from(bucket: "metrics")
  |> range(start: -1m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "gpu_status")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "utilization_percent")
  |> group()
  |> top(n: 1, columns: ["_value"])
  |> keep(columns: ["node_id", "_value"])
  |> yield(name: "gpu")

spec.title: List of free nodes (CPU < 20% AND GPU < 20%, last 5 min)

spec.query:
import "join"

cpu = from(bucket: "metrics")
  |> range(start: -1m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "node_status")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "cpu_usage_percent")
  |> group(columns: ["node_id"])
  |> last()
  |> group()
  |> keep(columns: ["node_id", "_value"])
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "cpu_usage"})

gpu = from(bucket: "metrics")
  |> range(start: -1m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "gpu_status")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "utilization_percent")
  |> group(columns: ["node_id"])
  |> max()
  |> group()
  |> keep(columns: ["node_id", "_value"])
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "gpu_usage"})

join.inner(
    left: cpu,
    right: gpu,
    on: (l, r) => l.node_id == r.node_id,
    as: (l, r) => ({node_id: l.node_id, cpu_usage: l.cpu_usage, gpu_usage: r.gpu_usage})
)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.cpu_usage < 20.0 and r.gpu_usage < 20.0)
  |> yield(name: "free_nodes")

from(bucket: "metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "node_status")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "cpu_usage_percent")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => contains(value: r.node_id, set: ${node_id:json}))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with label: r.node_id }))
  |> group(columns: ["label"])
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "label"])

from(bucket: "metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "node_status")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "cpu_usage_percent")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => contains(value: r.node_id, set: ${node_id:json}))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with label: r.node_id + " / CPU "}))
  |> group(columns: ["label"])
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "label"])

from(bucket: "metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "gpu_status")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "utilization_percent")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => contains(value: r.node_id, set: ${node_id:json}))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with label: r.node_id + " / GPU " + r.gpu_index}))
  |> group(columns: ["label"])
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "label"])

spec.title: Average CPU usage  across all nodes (%)

spec.query:
from(bucket: "metrics")
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "node_status")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "cpu_usage_percent")
  |> group(columns: ["node_id"])
  |> mean()
  |> group()
  |> mean()
  |> yield(name: "avg_cpu_all_nodes")

from(bucket: "metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "gpu_status")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "utilization_percent")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => contains(value: r.node_id, set: ${node_id:json}))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with label: r.node_id + " / GPU " + r.gpu_index}))
  |> group(columns: ["label"])
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "label"])

from(bucket: "metrics")
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "gpu_status")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "temperature_celsius")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => contains(value: r.node_id, set: ${node_id:json}))
  |> group(columns: ["node_id", "gpu_index"])
  |> last()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with label: r.node_id}))
  |> keep(columns: ["_value", "label"])
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["label"])

from(bucket: "metrics")
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "gpu_status")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "power_watts")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => contains(value: r.node_id, set: ${node_id:json}))
  |> group(columns: ["node_id", "gpu_index"])
  |> last()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with label: r.node_id}))
  |> keep(columns: ["_value", "label"])
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["label"])

from(bucket: "metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "gpu_status")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "memory_used_mib" or r._field == "memory_total_mib")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => contains(value: r.node_id, set: ${node_id:json}))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> pivot(
    rowKey: ["_time", "node_id", "gpu_index"],
    columnKey: ["_field"],
    valueColumn: "_value"
  )
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
    _time: r._time,
    _value: float(v: r.memory_used_mib) / float(v: r.memory_total_mib) * 100.0,
    label: r.node_id + " / GPU " + string(v: r.gpu_index)
  }))
  |> group(columns: ["label"])
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "label"])

from(bucket: "metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "gpu_status")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "memory_used_mib" or r._field == "memory_total_mib")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => contains(value: r.node_id, set: ${node_id:json}))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> pivot(
    rowKey: ["_time", "node_id", "gpu_index"],
    columnKey: ["_field"],
    valueColumn: "_value"
  )
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
    _time: r._time,
    _value: float(v: r.memory_used_mib) / float(v: r.memory_total_mib) * 100.0,
    label: r.node_id + " / GPU " + string(v: r.gpu_index)
  }))
  |> group(columns: ["label"])
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "label"])

from(bucket: "metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "node_status")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "memory_usage_percent")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => contains(value: r.node_id, set: ${node_id:json}))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with label: r.node_id + " / CPU "}))
  |> group(columns: ["label"])
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "label"])

from(bucket: "metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "node_status")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "memory_usage_percent")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => contains(value: r.node_id, set: ${node_id:json}))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with label: r.node_id }))
  |> group(columns: ["label"])
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "label"])

spec.title: Average memory (CPU) usage percent across all nodes

spec.query:
from(bucket: "metrics")
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "node_status")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "memory_usage_percent")
  |> group(columns: ["node_id"])
  |> mean()
  |> group()
  |> mean()
  |> yield(name: "avg_memory_all_nodes")

spec.title: Average GPU utilization across all nodes

spec.query:
from(bucket: "metrics")
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "gpu_status")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "utilization_percent")
  |> group(columns: ["node_id"])
  |> mean()
  |> group()
  |> mean()
  |> yield(name: "avg_gpu_util_all_nodes")

spec.title: Average GPU memory usage across all nodes

spec.query:
from(bucket: "metrics")
  |> range(start: -1m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "gpu_status")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "memory_used_mib" or r["_field"] == "memory_total_mib")
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.memory_total_mib > 0)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: float(v: r.memory_used_mib) / float(v: r.memory_total_mib) * 100.0 }))
  |> group(columns: ["node_id"])
  |> mean(column: "_value")
  |> group()
  |> mean(column: "_value")
  |> yield(name: "avg_gpu_mem_all_nodes")

spec.title: Average GPU temperature across all nodes

spec.query:
from(bucket: "metrics")
  |> range(start: -1m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "gpu_status")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "temperature_celsius")
  |> group(columns: ["node_id"])
  |> mean()
  |> group()
  |> mean()
  |> yield(name: "avg_gpu_temp_all_nodes")

spec.title: Average GPU power across all nodes

spec.query:
from(bucket: "metrics")
  |> range(start: -1m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "gpu_status")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "power_watts")
  |> group(columns: ["node_id"])
  |> mean()
  |> group()
  |> mean()
  |> yield(name: "avg_gpu_power_all_nodes")

from(bucket: "metrics")
  |> range(start: -1m)  
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "process_status")  
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "process_count") 
  |> filter(fn: (r) => int(v: r.uid) >= 1000)  
  |> keep(columns: ["uid"]) 
  |> group()  
  |> unique(column: "uid") 
  |> count(column: "uid")  
  |> yield(name: "active_users")

from(bucket: "metrics")
  |> range(start: -1m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "gpu_status")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "memory_used_mib" or r["_field"] == "memory_total_mib")
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.memory_total_mib > 0)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: float(v: r.memory_used_mib) / float(v: r.memory_total_mib) * 100.0 }))
  |> group()
  |> top(n: 1, columns: ["_value"])
  |> keep(columns: ["node_id", "_value"])
  |> yield(name: "max_gpu_mem_node")

spec.name: node_id
spec.label: node id

spec.query:
from(bucket: "metrics")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) =>
    r["_measurement"] == "node_status" 
  )
  |> filter(fn: (r) => exists r.node_id)
  |> keep(columns: ["node_id"])
  |> group()
  |> unique(column: "node_id")
  |> sort(columns: ["node_id"])
  |> yield(name: "all_node_ids")

spec.definition:
from(bucket: "metrics")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) =>
    r["_measurement"] == "node_status" 
  )
  |> filter(fn: (r) => exists r.node_id)
  |> keep(columns: ["node_id"])
  |> group()
  |> unique(column: "node_id")
  |> sort(columns: ["node_id"])
  |> yield(name: "all_node_ids")
